name: JUBILEE
description: Jubilation Lee has the Mutant ability to generate bursts of pyrotechnic plasma. She shapes radiant energy into vibrant projectiles that shimmer with brilliant, colorful light. Combined with her vampiric powers, every one of Jubilee's fireworks is an invigorating celebration on the battlefield!
lore: Thanks to her Mutant ability to generate pyrotechnic plasmoids, Jubilation Lee creates firework displays that are almost as explosive as her personality. Jubilee was with her fellow X-Men when a temporal storm relocated Krakoa to the year 2099. Unfortunately, the effects of the Timestream Entanglement caused her adopted son Shogo to become trapped in his dragon-form. Jubilee traveled to Thebes in the Collapsed Timeline, hoping Apocalypse could help her find a solution. In exchange, she became his Horseman of Famine, vowing to help him absorb the faith of the gods.

abilities.name: Energy Plasmoids
abilities.description: Fire lumikinetic explosive light blasts forward to heal friends and damage foes. Triggering a Sparkle Mark briefly boosts Attack Speed and enables firing without consuming energy

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 10m, decreasing to 70% at 30m

abilities.name: Blooming Ball
abilities.description: Launch a tracking orb of vampiric energy that damages enemies and heals allies in its radius. Striking the orb or hitting targets near it charges it up, increasing both its size and healing power. Press {Interactive} to manually recall it.

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 10m, decreasing to 70% at 30m

abilities.name: Sparking Sprint
abilities.description: Wrap yourself in vampiric energy to gain a Speed Boost. While active, jump height and Attack Speed are increased, and Energy Blasts can be fired at no cost

abilities.name: Dazzling Detonation
abilities.description: Detonate a firework energy orb, dealing damage to enemies in the area and applying a Blind effect. The energy can also be transferred to an ally, granting them healing and a Speed Boost

stats.Spell Field Range: Matches current range of selected orb

abilities.name: Sparkle Mark
abilities.description: Hitting targets with Dazzling Detonation and Firework Finale applies a Sparkle Mark. Energy Plasmoids can detonate marks, granting allies a Healing Boost and Bonus Health, while dealing burst damage and inflicting Vulnerability to enemies

abilities.name: Firework Finale
abilities.description: Charge up and unleash a massive ring of outward-flying firework clusters, Knocking Back nearby enemies. These clusters then orbit you, creating a field that damages enemies and heals allies. Expanding the cluster radius outward will Launch Up struck enemies

stats.Spell Field Range: Inner circle radius 6m; Outer circle radius 10m

base.description: When Attack Speed is enhanced, Energy Plasmoids transform into a hitscan attack that grants self-healing on hit and is capable of dealing critical hits.

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff starts at 10m, down to 70% at 30m

enhanced.description: When teaming up with The Hood, the Void Magic Mark is never cleared, allowing her to indefinitely sustain the hitscan attack form.

stats.Special Effect: The Void Magic mark is never cleared

base.description: Deploy a Vampiric Field. Allies standing within the field gain Life Steal when attacking enemies.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Blade, allies inside the field receive an additional Continuous Healing effect.
